sources.label: American Kennel Club breeds by group

packs.title: Around the world
packs.subtitle: A first ranking across six regions
packs.description: Start with familiar and less-familiar breeds and types from a deliberately global mix.

packs.title: Shapes and coats
packs.subtitle: An image-forward first ranking
packs.description: Compare a globally varied set with sharply different outlines, proportions, and coat presentations.

packs.title: Familiar and beyond
packs.subtitle: Recognizable names meet regional discoveries
packs.description: Begin with a broad mix spanning Africa, Asia, Europe, South America, and the Pacific.

packs.title: AKC Sporting Group sampler
packs.subtitle: One registry's Sporting Group
packs.description: A sampler using the American Kennel Club's Sporting Group designation; other registries organize breeds differently.

schemeAttribution.label: American Kennel Club — Sporting Group
schemeAttribution.note: A registry-specific sampler, not a universal classification.

schemeAttribution.label: American Kennel Club — Herding Group

packs.title: FCI Group 1 sampler
packs.subtitle: Sheepdogs and cattle dogs in the FCI scheme
packs.description: A sampler from FCI Group 1; registry nomenclature is named because group systems are not universal.

schemeAttribution.label: FCI — Group 1
schemeAttribution.note: A registry-specific sampler, not a universal classification.

packs.subtitle: Spitz and primitive types in the FCI scheme
packs.description: A sampler from FCI Group 5; registry nomenclature is named because group systems are not universal.

schemeAttribution.label: FCI — Group 5
schemeAttribution.note: A registry-specific sampler, not a universal classification.

packs.title: FCI Group 10 sampler
packs.subtitle: Sighthounds in the FCI scheme
packs.description: A sampler from FCI Group 10; registry nomenclature is named because group systems are not universal.

schemeAttribution.label: FCI — Group 10
schemeAttribution.note: A registry-specific sampler, not a universal classification.

packs.title: Sighthounds across regions
packs.subtitle: A globally distributed historical family
packs.description: Compare sighthound concepts from Africa, Asia, and Europe without treating any registry scheme as universal.

packs.title: Scent-hound traditions
packs.subtitle: Hounds from several naming traditions
packs.description: A cross-registry editorial grouping of scent-hound breeds and regional hound concepts.

packs.title: Spitz and northern types
packs.subtitle: Distinct regional branches
packs.description: A broad editorial set of spitz and northern breed concepts from Europe, Asia, and North America.

packs.title: Primitive and pariah types
packs.subtitle: Catalog concepts from several regions
packs.description: Explore current catalog concepts often discussed through primitive, pariah, or ancient-type histories.

packs.title: Livestock guardian histories
packs.subtitle: Mountain and pastoral breed concepts
packs.description: A regional mix linked by documented livestock-guardian histories, presented without suitability claims.

packs.title: Water-dog histories
packs.subtitle: Water dogs and water spaniels
packs.description: Compare catalog concepts whose names and histories connect them with water-dog traditions.

packs.title: Retriever histories
packs.subtitle: Current and predecessor concepts
packs.description: A mix of retriever breeds and cataloged predecessor concepts, with each item retaining its catalog status.

packs.title: Pointers and setters
packs.subtitle: A cross-registry sporting set
packs.description: An editorial comparison spanning pointer, setter, and closely related sporting breed names.

packs.title: Spaniel names and histories
packs.subtitle: A broad spaniel comparison
packs.description: Explore spaniel breeds across sporting, water, and regional naming traditions.

packs.title: Herding traditions around the world
packs.subtitle: Regional cattle and sheepdog concepts
packs.description: A geographically varied editorial set grounded in cataloged herding and cattle-dog histories.

packs.title: Mountain, draft, and sled histories
packs.subtitle: Large working histories across climates
packs.description: Compare breeds associated in historical sources with mountain, draft, or sled work—not present-day suitability.

packs.title: Giant silhouettes
packs.subtitle: A visual comparison of large outlines
packs.description: An image-led set selected for contrasting large-scale silhouettes, not for household or handling advice.

packs.title: Small companion traditions
packs.subtitle: Small breeds from several regions
packs.description: A globally varied set of small companion-breed traditions, framed as personal preference only.

packs.title: Hairless coat concepts
packs.subtitle: Breeds and cataloged varieties
packs.description: A visual set of hairless breeds and explicitly cataloged hairless or size varieties from several regions.

packs.title: Corded and curly coats
packs.subtitle: A coat-first visual set
packs.description: Compare distinct corded and curly coat presentations without inferring care needs or behavior.

packs.title: Rough and wire coats
packs.subtitle: Texture across several breed families
packs.description: A visual comparison of catalog concepts known for rough or wire coat presentations.

packs.title: Long and low silhouettes
packs.subtitle: A visual study in proportion
packs.description: Compare breeds with long-and-low outlines across hound, herding, spaniel, and terrier histories.

packs.title: Sleek silhouettes
packs.subtitle: Long lines across several histories
packs.description: An image-led comparison of streamlined outlines from several regions and breed families.

packs.title: Across Africa
packs.subtitle: Regional and internationally known concepts
packs.description: A gateway to breed and type concepts connected with regions across the African continent.

packs.title: Across East Asia
packs.subtitle: Breed concepts from several countries
packs.description: A regional discovery set spanning Japanese, Korean, and Chinese breed histories.

packs.title: Across South Asia
packs.subtitle: Regional breeds and types
packs.description: A discovery set of catalog concepts connected with the Indian subcontinent and Himalayan regions.

packs.title: Latin America and the Caribbean
packs.subtitle: Regional breed and type histories
packs.description: A discovery set spanning South America, Mexico, Venezuela, Uruguay, Argentina, Brazil, Peru, and Cuba.

packs.title: Across the Iberian Peninsula
packs.subtitle: Spanish and Portuguese histories
packs.description: A regional set spanning water dogs, hounds, mastiffs, and sheepdog concepts from Spain and Portugal.

packs.title: Britain and Ireland
packs.subtitle: Breed histories across the isles
packs.description: A varied regional set spanning collies, hounds, spaniels, terriers, corgis, and companion breeds.

packs.title: Across Northern Europe
packs.subtitle: Nordic and nearby breed histories
packs.description: A regional discovery set from the Nordic countries, Greenland, Denmark, Sweden, Finland, Norway, and Iceland.

packs.title: Across Central Europe
packs.subtitle: Breed histories across several countries
packs.description: A regional set spanning German, Hungarian, Swiss, and neighboring breed histories.

packs.title: Across the Balkans
packs.subtitle: Regional shepherd, hound, and companion histories
packs.description: A discovery set of catalog concepts connected with countries and regions across the Balkans.

packs.title: Central and Western Asia
packs.subtitle: Regional guardian and hound histories
packs.description: A broad regional set from Central Asia, the Caucasus, Anatolia, Afghanistan, and nearby traditions.

packs.title: Oceania and the Pacific
packs.subtitle: Australian, New Zealand, and Pacific concepts
packs.description: A regional set spanning Australian working and terrier histories, New Zealand dogs, and Pacific concepts.

packs.title: Historical catalog concepts
packs.subtitle: Preserved names, clearly labeled historical
packs.description: Historical concepts retained for discovery and ranking; none is presented here as a current breed.

packs.title: Crossbreeds: widely used names
packs.subtitle: Cataloged crossbreed concepts
packs.description: A sampler of widely used crossbreed names, each explicitly labeled as a crossbreed in the catalog.
packs.crossbreedDisclosure: Every item in this pack is a cataloged crossbreed concept; names do not predict an individual dog's traits.

packs.title: Crossbreeds: poodle-cross names
packs.subtitle: A naming pattern in the catalog
packs.description: Compare cataloged poodle-cross names while keeping their crossbreed status visible.
packs.crossbreedDisclosure: Every item in this pack is a cataloged crossbreed concept; names do not predict an individual dog's traits.

packs.title: Crossbreeds: small companion names
packs.subtitle: Cataloged crossbreed concepts
packs.description: A small-companion crossbreed sampler with status and naming context kept explicit.
packs.crossbreedDisclosure: Every item in this pack is a cataloged crossbreed concept; names do not predict an individual dog's traits.
